title: No tall/short grass
body:
# 🌿 No Grass – Cleaner World & Better Visibility

Tired of tall grass blocking your view during intense PvP battles? **No Grass** is a simple but effective resource pack that completely removes the textures for both short and tall grass, as well as ferns.

### ✨ Why use No Grass?
* ⚔️ **PvP Advantage:** See your opponents clearly without annoying plants getting in the way of your aim.
* 🧹 **Clean Aesthetics:** Gives your Minecraft world a much smoother and more organized appearance.
* 🚀 **FPS Friendly:** Removing these textures can slightly help with performance on low-end PCs.
* 💎 **Focus on What Matters:** Makes it easier to spot items dropped on the ground and small mobs.

### 🛠️ Compatibility:
* Works on **1.21.x versions** of Minecraft.
* Compatible with other resource packs (just place this one at the top of your list).
* No Optifine or Iris required!

**Get the ultimate visual advantage and clean up your battlefield today!**
